prompt: Preserve this exact scene and composition: cotton fabric bolts spilling across the studio worktable, one bolt unrolling a length of the small blue-and-white floral printed cotton toward the camera, plain natural cotton bolts mixed in, warm window daylight, lived-in atelier details. Keep it a real candid photograph, 35mm film look with subtle natural grain. IMPORTANT CHANGES: render the WHOLE scene in sharp focus with deep depth of field — the bolts, the table surface, AND the background all crisp and clearly detailed, not blurry or soft. Make the grade richer and cleaner, NOT faded or hazy: warm honey tones with gentle contrast, clean light, good clarity and micro-contrast. Add a ceramic coffee mug resting on the window sill in the background to add a lived-in feel. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Portrait framing.
